description_long: This is a compact, modern rifle with a matte black finish and a wooden grip, featuring a detachable magazine and a prominent suppressor attached to the barrel. The receiver and upper assembly are constructed from metal, with visible screws and mechanical details, while the grip and magazine have a textured, ergonomic design for secure handling. The rifle includes a simple iron sight system and a tactical accessory rail on top, suggesting modularity for attachments. The suppressor is cylindrical and extends significantly from the barrel, indicating a focus on noise reduction. The magazine is slightly curved and appears to be made of polymer or metal, with visible round count indicators. The overall design is streamlined and utilitarian, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, black rifle with a wooden grip, detachable magazine, and a large suppressor, featuring iron sights and a tactical rail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the suppressor, wooden grip, and detachable magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor's diameter and the alignment of the barrel and iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, grip, and suppressor, with mechanical details on the receiver.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the receiver, grip, and the end of the suppressor.
